title: Weak trust signals around AI-generated PM outputs
signal_cluster_summary: Customer and stakeholder inputs suggest growing concern about whether AI-generated PM outputs remain explainable enough to trust in formal reviews.
hypothesis_statement: Explainability expectations for AI-assisted PM work are rising and may create a new opportunity for ProductOS to differentiate on transparent decision support.

signals.signal_summary: Customer feedback asked for clearer provenance and rationale in generated outputs.
Leadership review raised concern that AI speed without explainability will hit trust limits.

what_must_be_true: Trust objections must recur across more than one customer or stakeholder segment.
Transparent evidence and decision traces must improve adoption or review success.
